prompt: Create a photorealistic full-body fashion editorial image of a young adult woman with soft medium brown short wavy bob hair, standing indoors with her back mostly facing the camera and her head turned over her shoulder toward the bright windows. She has a slim elegant figure and a calm, slightly surprised expression. She wears a delicate champagne-beige backless camisole with thin crisscross straps and a small tie at the lower back, paired with flowing sheer ivory wide-leg lounge pants that drape to the floor; the outfit is airy, feminine, and luxurious without looking explicit. The scene is a sunlit cream-toned living room with tall white French windows on the right, green garden foliage visible outside, a beige sofa with two round cylindrical pillows on the left, built-in shelves with books, a framed photo, and decorative vases in the background, and glossy pale marble flooring reflecting the sunlight. Use soft natural morning light streaming through the window, warm highlights, gentle shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, high-end magazine photography, vertical 4:5 composition, full-body view centered slightly left, elegant neutral palette, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic full-body fashion editorial image of a young adult woman with soft medium brown short wavy bob hair, standing indoors with her back mostly facing the camera and her head turned over her shoulder toward the bright windows. She has a slim elegant figure and a calm, slightly surprised expression. She wears a delicate champagne-beige backless camisole with thin crisscross straps and a small tie at the lower back, paired with flowing sheer ivory wide-leg lounge pants that drape to the floor; the outfit is airy, feminine, and luxurious without looking explicit. The scene is a sunlit cream-toned living room with tall white French windows on the right, green garden foliage visible outside, a beige sofa with two round cylindrical pillows on the left, built-in shelves with books, a framed photo, and decorative vases in the background, and glossy pale marble flooring reflecting the sunlight. Use soft natural morning light streaming through the window, warm highlights, gentle shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, high-end magazine photography, vertical 4:5 composition, full-body view centered slightly left, elegant neutral palette, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张照片级逼真的全身时尚编辑风格图像，主角是一位年轻女性，留着 柔和中棕色 的短波浪波波头，在室内站立，背部大部分朝向镜头，头部越过肩膀望向明亮的窗户。她身材苗条优雅，表情平静且略带惊讶。她身穿一件精致的香槟米色露背吊带背心，带有细交叉肩带和后腰小系带，搭配垂坠至地面的飘逸象牙白阔腿家居裤；整体造型轻盈、柔美且奢华，不显暴露。场景为一个阳光明媚的奶油色调客厅，右侧是高大的白色法式落地窗，窗外可见绿色花园植被；左侧有一张米色沙发，配有两个圆柱形靠枕；背景中有内置书架，摆放着书籍、相框和装饰花瓶；光亮的浅色大理石地面反射着阳光。采用从窗户射入的柔和自然晨光，暖色高光，柔和阴影，浅景深，真实的皮肤纹理，高端杂志摄影质感，4:5 竖构图，全身视角并略微居左，优雅的中性色调，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。
